---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: hardik2004gupta
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What limitation are you hitting?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why you ruled them out.

## Implementation Notes

Any technical details, API design ideas, or constraints the implementer should know.

## Priority

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would significantly improve the project
- [ ] Blocking use case

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar implementations elsewhere.
